findings.title: Meta description length is in range
Images missing alt text
findings.detail: 14 of 88 tags have no alt attribute.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text (empty alt="" only for decorative images).

findings.title: No lazy-loaded images
findings.recommendation: Add loading="lazy" to below-the-fold images to improve LCP.

findings.title: Links with no anchor text
findings.recommendation: Give links descriptive anchor text for users and crawlers.

findings.title: Content is fairly hard to read
findings.recommendation: Consider shorter sentences/simpler words unless the audience is specialist.

findings.title: Repetitive vocabulary
findings.recommendation: Vary wording and add substance; heavy repetition signals thin or spun content.

findings.title: Dominant topics detected
findings.detail: lasagna (60), recipe (27), ratings (26), allrecipes (20), recipes (17), sauce (16)  ·  phrases: lasagna ratings, dotdash meredith, meredith food

findings.title: No visible date signal
findings.detail: No published/modified date in metadata or near the top.
findings.recommendation: Expose a publish or last-updated date to signal freshness.

findings.title: No Organization/WebSite entity
findings.detail: No site-level Organization or WebSite markup detected.
findings.recommendation: Add Organization + WebSite JSON-LD (typically sitewide) to establish the publishing entity.

findings.title: No direct answer up top
findings.detail: The opening doesn't state a concise answer/definition.
findings.recommendation: Lead with a 1–2 sentence direct answer before the details; AI overviews lift the top summary.

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.recommendation: Optionally publish /llms.txt to guide AI crawlers to your key content. Evidence for ranking impact is still thin — treat as low-cost, low-certainty.

findings.title: AI crawlers are blocked in robots.txt
findings.detail: Disallowed from the site root: ClaudeBot (Anthropic (Claude)), Claude-Web (Anthropic (Claude on-demand)), PerplexityBot (Perplexity), Google-Extended (Google (Gemini / AI Overviews training)), CCBot (Common Crawl (feeds many LLMs)).
findings.recommendation: If you want visibility in AI answers, allow these agents. If the block is intentional (content protection), ignore this.
findings.evidence: ClaudeBot (Anthropic (Claude)), Claude-Web (Anthropic (Claude on-demand)), PerplexityBot (Perplexity), Google-Extended (Google (Gemini / AI Overviews training)), CCBot (Common Crawl (feeds many LLMs))

findings.title: Legacy image formats with real weight (7)
findings.detail: JPEG/PNG files over 100 KB that AVIF/WebP would shrink substantially.
findings.recommendation: Serve AVIF/WebP with <picture> or content negotiation.
findings.evidence: 23600-worlds-best-lasagna-armag-4x3-1-b24f9ad518d74090bf197828492c64a6.jpg (145 KB, jpeg), 23600-worlds-best-lasagna-DDMFS-step-01-1064-5dd7c3348e624ec2a266785d22dd52e3.jpg (140 KB, jpeg), 23600-worlds-best-lasagna-DDMFS-step-01-1-1066-a60ebdd7ec5a40ed8754b1f4df8ff1f4.jpg (119 KB, jpeg), 23600-worlds-best-lasagna-DDMFS-step-03-1065-3a965c2fd99344a7aee647cabc22f3a4.jpg (115 KB, jpeg)
